description_long: This house features a boxy, modern design with dark brown exterior walls and numerous tall, rectangular windows arranged in a grid-like pattern. The front facade includes a prominent balcony with white railings above the main entrance, and a set of double doors leading to the balcony. The structure is two stories tall, with a flat roof and a green rooftop area on one side, possibly intended as a terrace or garden. The layout reveals multiple interior rooms, visible through the open roof and large windows, suggesting a spacious and well-lit interior. The overall appearance is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, making it suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, two-story house with dark brown walls, tall grid windows, a balcony, and a flat green rooftop area. The design is boxy and contemporary, with a spacious, well-lit interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony with white railings, and a clear view of the interior room layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green rooftop area and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, more windows, and the full extent of the flat roof and green terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the side of the balcony, with less emphasis on the green rooftop.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door beneath a balcony, featuring white railings and no steps or overhang.
